title: JobTokenSecretManager.java
description: This Java file implements a SecretManager for job tokens in Hadoop MapReduce. It manages job token secrets using a TreeMap cache and interacts with Hadoop security classes. The class handles job token creation, storage, and retrieval, using a master key. It processes JobTokenIdentifier, job IDs, and tokens, outputting job token secrets as SecretKey objects or byte arrays. This file plays a crucial role in securing job tokens within the MapReduce framework.
